regulation: US FDA Food Additive & Food-Contact Regulations (21 CFR)
_note: ENABLED — parses the eCFR versioner /versions JSON (verified schema: content_versions[].{identifier,amendment_date,name,part,title,type,removed}). Emits one citable chunk per current section (parts 170,175,176,177,178) carrying its authoritative last-amended date for change detection. This indexes section-level metadata + amendment dates, not full CFR text; full-text ingestion via /full/{date}/title-21.xml is a future enhancement pending a validated CFR-XML parser.

ENABLED — same verified EcfrParser as FDA. No parts filter is set (Title 40 is large), so the first sync will exceed the circuit-breaker diff threshold and be HELD for R.E. sign-off — the intended safe behavior for a large new source. Scope it by adding parserConfig.parts (the EPA parts relevant to marker screening) once the R.E. confirms them.

SCAFFOLD — enabled:false. This is an HTML status page with no stable machine-readable schema; it tracks the evolving PFAS universal-restriction dossier rather than a fixed substance list. Confirm a structured source (or accept a curated summary) and build a validated parser before enabling.
